item.title: Engine Start Challenge
item.description: A challenge focused on getting an engine to start after restoration or modification work. What’s the key to a successful first start?

item.title: Testing a Budget Sandblaster
item.description: A low-cost sandblaster is tested to see how it performs in real workshop conditions. Can budget tools get the job done?

item.title: 1948 Chevy Returns to the Road
item.description: A classic 1948 Chevy is restored and returned to driving condition after repair work. What brings vintage cars back to life?

item.title: Revamped ’65 Fargo Build
item.description: A 1965 Fargo undergoes upgrades and restoration work to improve performance and reliability. What makes this rebuild stand out?

item.title: School Bus Find Gets a New Purpose
item.description: A retired school bus is repurposed into something new through creative rebuilding and modification. What can old vehicles become?

item.title: Chasing the Perfect Engine Sound
item.description: A hands-on project focused on tuning and refining an engine setup to achieve the ideal sound and performance balance. What makes an engine sound just right?

item.title: DIY Engine Swap Tips and Tricks
item.description: Helpful tips and practical insights for planning and completing a DIY engine swap project. What’s the biggest challenge when swapping an engine?
